description.value:
A slim dagger of dark iron, its blade etched with names in a script no living scholar recognises. The grip is warm, always warm, even in winter.

Curse. The dagger whispers the name of the last creature it killed. Each night the wielder sleeps with it on their person, they must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or gain one level of exhaustion from dreams of the dead.

unidentified.description: A dark iron dagger. The blade is etched with tiny symbols. It feels warm.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: A fine iron dagger with unusual etchings. Comfortably warm to the touch.
cursedMeta.trueNature: Sleep with it carried: DC 12 Wis save or gain 1 exhaustion level.

curse.name: Whispered Names
curse.description: Each night the wielder sleeps with this dagger on their person they make a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure they gain one level of exhaustion from dreams of the dead.

hints: The blade is always warm; etchings resemble names more than decoration.

escalation.effect: Light sleep and a sense of being named in the dark.
